---
format:
  typst:
    papersize: us-letter
    margin:
      x: 1.3cm
      y: 1.0cm
    fontsize: 9pt
    mainfont: "Helvetica Neue"
    include-in-header: _onepager-preamble.typ
execute:
  echo: false
  warning: false
  message: false
---

```{r setup}
source("../shiny/R/logic.R")
d <- uat_load("../templates")
s <- uat_summary(d$tests, d$defects, d$trace)
g <- uat_gate(d$tests, d$defects, d$trace)
verdict     <- gsub("_", "\\\\_", g$verdict)
verdict_col <- if (g$go) "#43c47d" else "#e8657a"
```

```{=typst}
#let muted = rgb("#94a1c0")
#let panel = rgb("#222630")
#let card(body) = block(fill: panel, radius: 6pt, inset: 8pt, width: 100%, body)

#text(size: 15pt, weight: "bold")[IRT / RTSM User Acceptance Testing]
#h(1fr)
#text(fill: muted, size: 8pt)[Operations-only · synthetic · no PHI · say *participant* not *subject*]

#line(length: 100%, stroke: 0.5pt + rgb("#3a4157"))
#v(2pt)

#grid(columns: (1fr, 1fr), gutter: 10pt,
  card[
    == What UAT confirms
    In a test environment you confirm that the vendor's randomization and drug-supply build does *exactly* what your URS and specs say, before any real participant is randomized. You operate the staging IRT in a browser, record dated screenshot evidence, and transcribe results into your workbook so the record is attributable and stands alone for an auditor.
  ],
  card[
    == The go-live gate (conjunctive)
    Sign-off is READY only when *all three* hold:
    #list(
      [Every *Critical* test passes],
      [*0* open Critical / Major defects],
      [*100%* traceability (every requirement has a test)],
    )
    Current snapshot: #text(fill: rgb("`r verdict_col`"), weight: "bold")[`r verdict`]. \
    #text(fill: muted, size: 8pt)[The gate packages evidence; a named human signs. It does not grant approval.]
  ],
)

#v(4pt)

#grid(columns: (1.1fr, 1fr), gutter: 10pt,
  card[
    == Live snapshot
    #table(columns: (1fr, auto), stroke: none, inset: 3pt,
      [Test scripts], text(fill: rgb("#e9edf7"))[*`r s$total`*],
      [Passed], text(fill: rgb("#43c47d"))[*`r s$pass`*],
      [Failed], text(fill: rgb("#e8657a"))[*`r s$fail`*],
      [Open defects], text(fill: rgb("#e0a64c"))[*`r s$open_def`*],
      [Requirements traced], text(fill: rgb("#3fd0c9"))[*`r s$cov`%*],
    )
  ],
  card[
    == Defect severity drives the gate
    #table(columns: (auto, 1fr, auto), stroke: none, inset: 3pt,
      text(fill: rgb("#e8657a"))[*Critical*], [Could break the blind, mis-randomize, mis-dose, or corrupt integrity], text(fill: rgb("#e8657a"))[Blocks],
      text(fill: rgb("#e0a64c"))[*Major*], [Significant functional error in a key workflow (resupply, wrong kit, missing alert)], text(fill: rgb("#e0a64c"))[Blocks until fixed],
      text(fill: muted)[*Minor*], [Cosmetic / non-functional (label typo, missing site number)], text(fill: rgb("#43c47d"))[Fix or waive],
    )
  ],
)

#v(4pt)

#card[
  == The 8-step workflow
  #grid(columns: (1fr,1fr,1fr,1fr), gutter: 6pt,
    [*1.* Derive test cases from URS + specs (positive · negative · boundary)],
    [*2.* Load the approved test list into the staging IRT],
    [*3.* Execute each case in the browser; be systematic, not happy-path],
    [*4.* Record result + dated screenshot evidence],
    [*5.* Log every failure as a defect with a severity],
    [*6.* Vendor fixes; retest against the new build],
    [*7.* Traceability: confirm every requirement maps to a passing test],
    [*8.* Evaluate the gate; a named human signs the package into the eTMF],
  )
]

#v(4pt)

#card[
  == Run it
  #grid(columns: (auto, 1fr), align: horizon + left, gutter: 10pt,
    raw("shiny::runApp('uat_irt/shiny')", lang: "r", block: false),
    text(fill: muted, size: 8pt)[Mark Pass/Fail, close a defect, and the KPIs + gate recompute live.],
  )
]
```
